visual_observations.composition_style: low-angle product hero — four cold brew cans shot from below against bright blue sky with clouds
visual_observations.lighting: outdoor natural daylight, blue sky backdrop, sunlight on can surfaces
props_visible: Four Barns Cold Brew cans (Arabic + English 'كولد برو / Cold Brew')
Water condensation droplets on can surfaces
Colorful abstract can graphics (circles, dots, geometric patterns)
notable_visual_elements: Worm's-eye / low-angle shot makes cans appear monumental against sky
Colorful abstract can design differentiates the canned line from the cup format
Sky as backdrop = freedom, freshness, outdoor lifestyle brand signal

cultural_notes.free_notes: Canned cold brew represents Barns expanding beyond the cafe into the FMCG/retail channel. Low-angle sky shot is a visual technique borrowed from streetwear/beverage lifestyle photography. No text needed — the product and sky communicate 'grab and go freedom' for the Saudi young professional audience.

pattern_matches.notes: Four cans as hero subject, dramatic low angle elevates them to architectural scale
Outdoor sky setting positions cold brew as an on-the-go lifestyle product, not just cafe-bound
